controls.name: Password History >= 24
controls.description: Enforce the remembrance of 24 or more previous passwords to prevent reuse.
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Password Policy > Enforce password history: 24

controls.name: Maximum Password Age <= 365 days
controls.description: Passwords must expire within 365 days (recommend 60 days).
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Password Policy > Maximum password age: 60

controls.name: Minimum Password Age >= 1 day
controls.description: Passwords cannot be changed more than once per day, preventing bypass of history.
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Password Policy > Minimum password age: 1

controls.name: Minimum Password Length >= 14
controls.description: Passwords must be at least 14 characters long.
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Password Policy > Minimum password length: 14

controls.name: Password Complexity Enabled
controls.description: Passwords must meet complexity requirements (uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol).
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Password Policy > Password must meet complexity requirements: Enabled

controls.name: Account Lockout Threshold <= 5
controls.description: Lock accounts after no more than 5 invalid login attempts to prevent brute-force.
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Account Lockout Policy > Account lockout threshold: 5

controls.name: Account Lockout Duration >= 15 minutes
controls.description: Locked accounts remain locked for at least 15 minutes.
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Account Policies > Account Lockout Policy > Account lockout duration: 15

controls.name: User Account Control: Enable Admin Approval Mode
controls.description: EnableLUA must be enabled to enforce UAC for all administrators.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableLUA = 1

controls.name: UAC: Admin Prompt Behaviour - Prompt for Consent on Secure Desktop
controls.description: Admins must be prompted on the secure desktop when elevating.
controls.remediation: Set ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin = 2 (Prompt for consent on the secure desktop)

controls.name: UAC: User Prompt Behaviour - Auto Deny Elevation
controls.description: Standard users should be denied elevation requests automatically.
controls.remediation: Set ConsentPromptBehaviorUser = 0 (Automatically deny elevation requests)

controls.name: UAC: Prompt on Secure Desktop
controls.description: Elevation prompts must be displayed on the secure desktop.
controls.remediation: Set PromptOnSecureDesktop = 1

controls.name: Windows Firewall - Domain Profile: State = On
controls.description: Windows Defender Firewall must be active on the Domain network profile.
controls.remediation: Enable Windows Defender Firewall for Domain profile via Group Policy or Settings

controls.name: Windows Firewall - Private Profile: State = On
controls.description: Windows Defender Firewall must be active on the Private network profile.
controls.remediation: Enable Windows Defender Firewall for Private profile

controls.name: Windows Firewall - Public Profile: State = On
controls.description: Windows Defender Firewall must be active on the Public network profile.
controls.remediation: Enable Windows Defender Firewall for Public profile

controls.name: LAN Manager Authentication Level >= 5
controls.description: Only NTLMv2 authentication should be accepted. LmCompatibilityLevel must be 5.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\LmCompatibilityLevel = 5

controls.name: Do Not Store LAN Manager Hash
controls.description: LM hashes should not be stored in Active Directory or local SAM databases.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\NoLMHash = 1

controls.name: WDigest Authentication Disabled
controls.description: WDigest must not store credentials in memory (prevents credential dumping).
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SecurityProviders\WDigest\UseLogonCredential = 0

controls.name: Remote Registry Service: Disabled
controls.description: Remote Registry service should be disabled to prevent remote registry manipulation.
controls.remediation: Set Remote Registry service Startup Type to Disabled via services.msc or Group Policy

controls.name: Print Spooler: Disabled (if not required)
controls.description: Print Spooler should be disabled on systems that do not need printing (PrintNightmare).
controls.remediation: Disable the Print Spooler service on non-printing workstations

controls.name: Audit Credential Validation: Success and Failure
controls.description: Both successful and failed credential validation attempts must be audited.
controls.remediation: auditpol /set /subcategory:'Credential Validation' /success:enable /failure:enable

controls.name: Audit Logon Events: Success and Failure
controls.description: Both successful and failed logon events must be audited.
controls.remediation: auditpol /set /subcategory:'Logon' /success:enable /failure:enable

controls.name: Audit Account Lockout: Failure
controls.description: Failed account lockout events must be audited.
controls.remediation: auditpol /set /subcategory:'Account Lockout' /failure:enable

controls.name: Audit Process Creation: Success
controls.description: Successful process creation events must be audited (enables command-line logging).
controls.remediation: auditpol /set /subcategory:'Process Creation' /success:enable

controls.name: Autorun Disabled for All Drives
controls.description: AutoRun must be disabled for all drives to prevent malware from auto-executing.
controls.remediation: Set NoDriveTypeAutoRun = 255 (0xFF) to disable AutoRun for all drive types

controls.name: Anonymous Access Restricted
controls.description: Anonymous access to the SAM accounts and shares must be restricted.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymous = 1

controls.name: Anonymous SAM Enumeration Restricted
controls.description: Anonymous enumeration of SAM accounts must be disabled.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\RestrictAnonymousSAM = 1

controls.name: WinRM Client: Disable Basic Authentication
controls.description: WinRM must not use Basic authentication (plaintext credentials over HTTP).
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WinRM\Client\AllowBasic = 0

controls.name: WinRM Service: Disable Basic Authentication
controls.description: WinRM Service must not use Basic authentication.
controls.remediation: Set HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WinRM\Service\AllowBasic = 0
